summary: Comprehensive testing of Phase 1 (Story visibility model + cross-user access + attribution) and Phase 2A (Core action integrity). All 29 backend API tests passed. Frontend StoryViewerPage tested successfully with attribution badge, creator_name, and ContinuationModal working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: ContinuationModal correctly handles preset prop (lines 20, 27-35) - pre-fills title and instruction fields when preset is provided
StoryViewerPage correctly displays creator_name in meta section (line 208) and attribution badge with derivative_label, source_story_title, source_creator_name (lines 216-232)
Post-gen buttons (Add Twist, Make Funny, Next Episode, variation chips) are correctly wired to openPresetContinuation function with appropriate presets and analytics events
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All visibility and feed endpoints are working correctly. The post-gen buttons (Add Twist, Make Funny, Next Episode, variation chips) are only visible when a story is in READY/PARTIAL_READY state. Since no stories are currently in that state for test user, the buttons cannot be tested via UI automation. However, code review confirms the implementation is correct - all buttons call openPresetContinuation with appropriate mode and preset objects. The ContinuationModal correctly pre-fills title and instruction from preset prop.

backend_tests_summary.TestDiscoverFeed: 7 tests passed - pagination, sorting (latest/trending/most_continued), excludes seed content, includes creator_name
backend_tests_summary.TestContinueWatchingFeed: 3 tests passed - requires auth, returns success, tracks viewed stories
backend_tests_summary.TestTrendingFeed: 3 tests passed - returns success, sorted by battle_score, only public/legacy visibility
backend_tests_summary.TestSetVisibility: 4 tests passed - requires auth, owner can change, non-owner blocked, validates values
backend_tests_summary.TestBackfillVisibility: 2 tests passed - requires admin, admin can run
backend_tests_summary.TestViewerVisibilityEnforcement: 3 tests passed - public story viewable, private blocked for non-owner, private viewable by owner
backend_tests_summary.TestContinuationVisibilityEnforcement: 2 tests passed - continue-episode and continue-branch block private stories for non-owners
backend_tests_summary.TestViewerAttribution: 2 tests passed - returns attribution fields and creator_name
backend_tests_summary.TestNewStoriesDefaultVisibility: 1 test passed - stories have valid visibility values
backend_tests_summary.TestWatchHistoryTracking: 1 test passed - viewer tracks watch history

frontend_tests_summary.StoryViewerPage: All elements verified - viewer-title, story-meta with creator_name, viewer-next-episode-btn, viewer-remix-btn, viewer-actions, create-episode-btn, create-branch-btn
frontend_tests_summary.ContinuationModal: Opens correctly from Create Episode button, shows modal title, title input, story input, closes properly
frontend_tests_summary.Attribution: Attribution badge (data-testid='attribution-badge') displays correctly for derivative stories with derivative_label, source_story_title, source_creator_name
